data.body: AUTONOMOUS BUILD COMPLETE — ticket LEFT OPEN for human browser validation per Joe's direction. Built + independently security-reviewed: rebar workflow edit <file> serves a bpmn-js host (standard Modeler, BPMN-only palette -> constrained metamodel) over the 00da serializer; Save round-trips BPMN->IR (un-mappable/invalid edits rejected, file untouched; prior IR backed up to .bak; visual format never committed). Out-of-process (bpmn-js CDN browser-side; Python is stdlib http.server + serializer). Security hardened: loopback-only + per-session token + Host-header check on /save (CSRF/DNS-rebinding); XXE blocked. 9 offline tests cover launcher/server/round-trip/rejection/CSRF/backup/XXE. Commit 8b16a0ee. REMAINING (the epic gate Joe will validate): open the editor in a real browser, edit flow/steps/loops/conditionals visually, Save, and confirm the IR round-trips as expected.
